messages.content:
Rewrite the CVE description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system. Starting in version 14.0.0 and prior to versions 14.3.2 and 15.1.2, authenticated users are able to exploit a cross-site scripting vulnerability when viewing certain localized backoffice components. Versions 14.3.2 and 15.1.2 contain a patch.

Umbraco, an open-source .NET content management system, is vulnerable to cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks. This vulnerability affects authenticated users interacting with specific localized components in the backoffice. The issue is resolved in versions 14.3.2 and 15.1.2.
